title: Glint +
description: Better Glint gives your Minecraft experience a cleaner and more vibrant enchantment effect with smooth colors, improved shine, and a modern look. Designed to make enchanted items stand out without being distracting, this pack is perfect for PvP, survival,
body: Better Glint enhances the look of enchanted items with a cleaner, brighter, and more stylish enchantment effect. Featuring smoother animations, vibrant colors, and a polished modern shine, this pack makes every weapon, tool, and armor piece stand out while still keeping the original Minecraft feel. Designed for players who want a more satisfying and visually appealing experience, Better Glint works perfectly for PvP, survival, and casual gameplay. The improved glint effect is optimized to look smooth without being too distracting, giving your game a fresh and high-quality appearance every time you enchant your gear.
